description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a dark, forged metal head. The handle is made from a single piece of wood, showing a natural grain and a smooth, ergonomic taper towards the end for a secure grip. The axe head is wedge-shaped with a single sharp cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for splitting or chopping wood. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with the wood expanding inside the eye of the head. The metal head has a matte, slightly rough finish, indicating it is forged rather than polished. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark, forged metal head featuring a single sharp edge and a flat poll. The handle is smooth and ergonomic, and the blade is securely wedged onto the handle.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an angle highlighting the curvature of the wooden handle and the wedge-shaped blade, with the cutting edge and poll both visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the full length of the handle and the profile of the blade, showing the single sharp edge and the flat poll.
description_view_2: A close side angle showing the thickness of the handle and the depth of the axe head, with the eye of the blade and the mounting clearly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head, with the blade edge partially visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and oval cross-section, tapering slightly towards the end.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped forged steel blade with a flat poll and no decorative features; functional, utilitarian design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting, with the wooden handle expanding inside the eye of the blade.
